name: Dakota Borysik {Alt: Royalty}
description:

The cold, elusive Czar of Russia needs a spouse. So what else would he do other then hold a ball for all the maidens and men in the land? It wouldn’t matter to him if you were rich or poor, male or female, or anything in between, he just needed to get his ducks in a row to secure his lineage.
